title: Paper clay seashell wall arrangement
notes: Six to eight clay seashell forms arranged on a backing slab or hung individually. Forms include: spiral conch pressed from a coil, ridged clam pressed over the actual shell, flat disc scallop. Paper clay retains fine shell ridge detail without cracking. Each piece has a pierced hole or recessed magnet embed. PVA sealed, left white or given a dilute watercolour wash for coastal colouring.
